title: MineAndChill
description: Just a chill minecraft modpack that combines Create with addons and a lot of quiality of live mods.
body:
# Overview

MineAndChill is a carefully curated Minecraft modpack designed for players who crave a blend of creative technology and a cozy, immersive gameplay experience. Centered around the Create mod, this pack emphasizes engaging, hands-on mechanical systems while steering clear of overly automated, single-block solutions that simplify processes. Paired with a focus on a welcoming atmosphere, diverse mobs, vibrant building materials, and stunning visuals, MineAndChill delivers a relaxed and delightful journey for builders, engineers, and explorers alike.

## Key Features

### Technology with Create
![Train with crete mode](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/o7A9vV69/images/8155e8bf3d3bf6380deb9946b0a6d792f2f362f4.jpeg)
**Core Mod: Create**
Dive into a world of gears, belts, and mechanical wonders with the Create mod as the heart of the tech experience. Build intricate contraptions, from windmills to automated farms, using a modular and visually satisfying system that encourages creativity over automation.

**No One-Block Wonders**
Unlike tech-heavy modpacks that rely on single blocks to automate entire processes, MineAndChill focuses on multi-step, interactive systems. Mods like Create Crafts & Additions and Create: Steam 'n' Rails enhance the Create experience with additional machinery and transport options, keeping the focus on player-driven ingenuity.

**Balanced Progression**
Supporting mods like Applied Energistics 2 (for storage only) and Immersive Engineering add depth to your tech builds without overshadowing Create's charm. Expect a progression that feels rewarding and hands-on, with minimal reliance on "set-and-forget" automation.

### Friendly and Immersive Atmosphere
![Let`s Do mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/o7A9vV69/images/9196b2cb899640811e0653196c059e3418a53811.jpeg)
**Diverse Mobs**
Encounter a variety of creatures, which add unique, non-hostile animals to the world, enhancing exploration with a sense of wonder. Hostile mobs are balanced to feel challenging yet not overwhelming, ensuring a stress-free experience.

**Vibrant Building Materials**
Expand your creative palette with mods like Chisel, Decorative Blocks. From intricately carved stone to cozy wooden furnishings, these mods offer a wide range of blocks and decorative items to make every build visually spectacular.

**Stunning Visuals**
With Complementary Shaders (optional) and Dynamic Surroundings, MineAndChill transforms your Minecraft world into a breathtaking landscape. Lush biomes from Biomes O' Plenty and enhanced lighting create a serene and picturesque environment perfect for relaxed building and exploration.

### Relaxed and Enjoyable Gameplay
**Chill Vibes**
MineAndChill is designed for players who want to unwind. The modpack avoids grind-heavy mechanics and overly complex tech trees, focusing instead on intuitive systems and a welcoming world. Mods like Farmer's Delight add cozy cooking mechanics, while Supplementaries introduces charming details like hanging signs and jars for a homely feel.

**Exploration and Adventure**
Explore diverse biomes, discover new structures. The emphasis is on discovery and fun, not pressure.

**Performance and Accessibility**
Optimized for smooth performance, MineAndChill runs well on mid-range systems. The pack is beginner-friendly, with clear documentation and optional in-game guides via FTB Quests to help newcomers get started.


## Why Play MineAndChill?

If you love the idea of building intricate machines with a steampunk flair, crafting beautiful homes in vibrant landscapes, and exploring a world filled with friendly creatures and cozy details, MineAndChill is for you. This modpack is perfect for solo players or small servers looking to create, explore, and relax in a stress-free environment. Whether you're a tinkerer designing a Create-powered factory or a builder crafting a picturesque village, MineAndChill offers a delightful and approachable experience.

## Licenses

This modpack uses different mods :)
These mods are from CurseForge:
[Create Recycle Everything](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-recycle-everything),
[Goblin Traders](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/goblin-traders),
[Framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework),
[Chimes](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/chimes)
